overall.description: A cinematic walkthrough of a futuristic cyberpunk city (Cyberpunk 2077), beginning in a covered pedestrian walkway with neon accents, descending to street level, crossing intersections, briefly driving a vehicle, and ascending to an upper plaza with striking architecture and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking through covered corridor with neon accent lighting and reflective floors

notable_agents.action: woman in business attire walking past the camera in opposite direction

entered.detail: dark ceiling with linear white lighting fixtures
large vertical pink-lit advertisement screen displaying graphics
large rectangular planter with lush green ferns and purple flowers
transparent safety railing along the walkway edge

segments.scene_description: The clip opens in a sleek, covered pedestrian walkway with polished marble floors and neon accent lighting. A woman walks past as the camera moves forward through the corridor, passing by a large digital billboard with pink lighting on the left and a planter box with ferns on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian ramp descending to street level

events.description: exits covered walkway and begins descending ramp toward street level
emerges from shadow of covered area into direct sunlight

agents.ego_description: walking down ramp toward the street intersection with increasing visibility of surrounding skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking ahead down the ramp toward street level

entered.detail: tall angular glass building with reflective blue-tinted surfaces
large yellow advertisement screen with black graphics and text
multi-lane road with moving traffic visible below

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the covered walkway and descends a ramp toward street level, transitioning from artificial to natural lighting. Two pedestrians walk ahead as futuristic glass skyscrapers and a large yellow digital billboard come into view, with the street and traffic becoming visible on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: crossing the street at yellow-marked crosswalk with other pedestrians
turns left to follow sidewalk along the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and proceeding along the sidewalk among other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the street
pedestrian in colorful purple and green outfit walking on sidewalk

entered.detail: broad yellow zebra crossing markings on asphalt
multi-level building with glass walkways and neon green accents
tall vertical advertisement with purple and green graphics

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide urban intersection under bright sunlight. The camera crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk among other pedestrians, then turns left along the sidewalk. A futuristic building complex with glass walkways dominates the left side while vehicles pass on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street with vehicle traffic and sidewalks

events.description: camera enters vehicle and switches to third-person driving perspective
exits vehicle and returns to first-person walking perspective

agents.ego_description: briefly drives a futuristic light blue sports car along the street before exiting and continuing on foot

notable_agents.action: light blue futuristic sports car with red interior being driven by ego

entered.detail: black and yellow bollards separating sidewalk from road
modern glass building facade with reflective windows

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts as the ego enters a light blue futuristic vehicle and drives along the multi-lane road, passing other cars and pedestrians. After a brief drive, the camera exits the vehicle and returns to walking along the sidewalk, with road barriers and modern glass buildings lining the path.

events.description: approaches and begins ascending wide outdoor staircase
enters shadow of upper building structure while climbing stairs

agents.ego_description: walking toward and climbing the wide staircase to upper plaza level

notable_agents.action: person climbing stairs ahead of ego toward upper level

entered.detail: wide black stairs with illuminated blue neon edges
black cubic structure with bright yellow neon trim
glass and metal pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a grand staircase with blue neon-edged steps leading upward. As the ego ascends, the view opens to reveal an overhead walkway bridge and a striking black structure with yellow neon framing. The lighting shifts as the camera enters the shadow of the upper buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with neon-accented canopy

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters covered upper walkway
passes by holographic quest marker floating in air

agents.ego_description: walking through upper level plaza with neon-lit canopy structures and mature trees

notable_agents.action: security guard in uniform standing near building entrance
woman in white dress walking ahead through plaza

entered.detail: covered walkway with yellow neon trim and glass roof panels
floating text display showing quest information and objectives
large mature trees in integrated planters along walkway

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs, the scene transitions to an elevated pedestrian plaza with a canopy featuring yellow neon accents. The camera walks past a holographic signage display and mature trees in planters, with a security guard visible near a building entrance. The environment feels like a premium commercial district with polished surfaces and integrated greenery.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sleek, enclosed pedestrian corridor into a sprawling, sunlit cyberpunk metropolis before ascending to a premium elevated plaza. It begins within a covered walkway of polished marble and neon accents, moving past digital billboards and greenery before descending a ramp that shifts the lighting from artificial glow to bright daylight. As the camera enters a wide urban intersection, it crosses a yellow-striped street and briefly shifts perspective into a light blue futuristic vehicle, gliding through traffic before returning to a pedestrian path lined with glass skyscrapers. The scene then turns toward a grand staircase with blue neon edges, ascending through the shadows of towering structures toward an overhead walkway and a striking black-and-yellow architectural frame. Finally, the movement culminates in an elevated commercial district, passing holographic signage and manicured trees under a yellow-accented canopy.
